name: Tree DP, Interval DP — Burst Balloons, Matrix Chain
scenario: Build Tree DP, Interval DP — Burst Balloons, Matrix Chain.
ai_policy_explanation: DP state: define dp[i] meaning. Base case. Recurrence. Coin Change: dp[0]=0, dp[i]=min(dp[i-c]+1). 0/1 Knapsack: iterate j BACKWARDS. LIS: dp[i]=max(dp[j]+1) for all j<i where nums[j]<nums[i]. Edit Distance: match→dp[i-1][j-1]; mismatch→1+min(replace,delete,insert).
